blended.narrative: Tremblant (Gray Rocks) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.4 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,485 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
